# REQ-FR-260019: MVP Critical End-to-End Acceptance Flows

- Class: FR
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-04-17
- Source decision: I1 (Acceptance flows)

## Requirement

The release candidate shall pass end-to-end validation for the six critical MVP flows: demo sign-in entry, blank workspace entry followed by explicit search graph load, atom create/edit persistence, bond create/name persistence, deletion safety behavior, and resilient user-facing error handling without workspace crash.

## Rationale

Core user value can only be trusted when the highest-impact workflows are validated end to end before release.

## Scope Notes

- In scope for MVP: critical flow automation/manual gating for release readiness.
- Out of scope for this requirement: exhaustive long-tail scenario coverage in MVP.

## Verification

- Release checks confirm all six critical flows pass in preflight validation.
- Regression checks confirm known high-risk paths remain stable across releases.
- Failure analysis confirms blocking flow regressions prevent release approval.

## Traceability

- Related ADRs: ADR-260020
- Related backlog items: BI-260017
